title: Unstoppable Longevity: LPL Star Surpasses Faker and Chovy in International Appearances
summary: While the spotlight often shines on LCK's legendary mid-laners, JDG's JunJia has quietly secured an incredible record: participating in every single international tournament for over three consecutive years.
author: HaleyEsports

content.value: In the fast-paced world of League of Legends esports, consistency is the hardest trait to maintain. While the rivalry between BLG and JDG dominates the LPL headlines, a remarkable individual milestone has emerged. JDG's jungler, **JunJia**, has achieved a feat that currently eludes even the game's greatest legends, Faker and Chovy: a perfect attendance record at international tournaments for over three years.
blog/images/junjia-achievement.jpg
content.caption: JunJia's 7+ consecutive international appearances: From MSI 2023 to the upcoming First Stand 2026.

content.value:
### A Streak Beyond Legends

Since 2023, JunJia has been present at MSI, Worlds, and in 2025, he competed in both **First Stand** and the **Esports World Cup (EWC)**. If we look strictly at Riot Games' primary international circuit, JunJia stands alone. Many fans recall that the LCK’s premier mid-lane duo, Faker and Chovy, were notably absent from last year's First Stand, breaking their otherwise stellar streaks.
blog/images/faker-chovy.jpg
content.caption: LCK giants Faker and Chovy: Despite their dominance, even they have faced breaks in their international attendance.

content.value:
### The LPL Powerhouse vs. LCK's Gen.G

As JDG and BLG prepare for the Split 1 finals to determine the "King of the Split," both teams are already looking ahead to **First Stand 2026**. However, the path to another international trophy won't be easy. 

Standing in their way is the LCK’s **Gen.G**, a team that has shown near-perfect form both domestically and internationally. For the stars of Gen.G, First Stand is more than just another tournament; it’s a critical opportunity to solidify their positions in the upcoming ASIAD lineup. LPL fans are eager to see if JunJia and JDG can translate their consistent attendance into another major championship victory against the rising LCK tide.

title: Cosmic Horror Returns: The Infectious Madness of Doctor Dekker 2 Demo Captivates Fans
summary: After nearly a decade, the FMV cult classic returns. The sequel to Doctor Dekker has appeared as a highlight of Steam Next Fest, promising deeper mysteries and a refined investigation system.
author: HaleyReviews

content.value: After almost a decade in the shadows, **The Infectious Madness of Doctor Dekker 2** is proving that its return is far more than just a nostalgia trip. Currently scheduled for a full release in 2026, the game has recently become a standout sensation during Steam Next Fest, drawing massive interest from the Full Motion Video (FMV) community.
blog/images/dekker2-patient1.png
content.caption: The therapy sessions return: Patients with inexplicable issues provide clues and confusion in equal measure.

content.value:
### Return to Cosmic Horror

The sequel continues to explore the unsettling world surrounding Doctor Dekker—a character deeply influenced by the cosmic horror themes of H.P. Lovecraft. Players once again take the therapist's chair, interviewing patients who were previously under Dekker's care to piece together the truth behind his disappearance and the mysterious death of Doctor Alderby.
blog/images/dekker2-patient2.png
content.caption: FMV performances are the heart of the game, with subtle cues in acting serving as the primary evidence.

content.value:
### Multi-Layered Mystery & High Replayability

What sets this sequel apart is its complex, overlapping narrative. Each patient isn't just a witness; they bring their own supernatural baggage. Some claim to hear voices from another realm, others possess unexplainable abilities or memories that defy logic. This creates a dense web of intrigue where even the smallest vocal inflection matters.

A key returning feature is the **randomized murderer mechanic**. In every playthrough, the killer's identity can change, meaning players can't rely on past experience to solve the case. This single feature has kept fans buzzing on forums, generating endless theories from just the initial demo.
blog/images/dekker2-closeup.png
content.caption: Visual intimacy: The game forces you to look closer into the eyes of those you are trying to heal—or catch.

content.value:
### Refined Investigation Systems

D'Avekki Studios has intelligently streamlined the interaction system. Moving away from the free-typing mechanics of the first game—which could sometimes be disorienting—the sequel uses a curated topic-based system. This allows the conversation to flow more naturally, letting players focus on analyzing the performance and subtext rather than struggling with input commands.
blog/images/dekker2-atmosphere.png
content.caption: The iconic green sofa and chilling atmosphere maintain the series' unique visual identity.

content.value:
### A New Standard for FMV?

Critics and players alike have compared the game's depth to titles like *Immortality*, where discovery is driven by visual data. However, *Doctor Dekker 2* retains its own identity: a quiet, claustrophobic therapy room filled with an ever-present sense of unease.

While we've only seen the demo, the potential is clear. With a gripping plot, smart investigation mechanics, and high replay value, *The Infectious Madness of Doctor Dekker 2* is shaping up to be a definitive FMV experience for 2026.
blog/images/dekker2-clue.png
content.caption: Every object and every word could be a piece of a much larger, darker puzzle.

title: Project Helix: Microsoft's Next-Gen Xbox to Bridge the Gap Between Console and PC
summary: Microsoft Gaming has officially unveiled the first details of its next-generation console, code-named Project Helix. This revolutionary hybrid system aims to merge the power of PC gaming with the convenience of a console.
author: HaleyNews

content.value: In a move that has sent shockwaves through the hardware industry, Microsoft Gaming has officially announced the first details regarding its next-generation console. Codenamed **Project Helix**, this upcoming device promises to dismantle the final barrier between dedicated gaming consoles and personal computers (PCs).
blog/images/project-helix-logo.png
content.caption: The Project Helix logo: A double helix forming an 'X', symbolizing the convergence of two major software ecosystems.

content.value:
### The Ultimate Xbox-PC Integration

The most significant highlight of the announcement by Microsoft Gaming's CEO, **Asha Sharma**, is the console's comprehensive compatibility. Project Helix is designed not only to run native Xbox titles but also to seamlessly operate PC games. This makes it an unprecedented "hybrid" system in Microsoft's hardware history.

"We are building a platform without boundaries," Sharma stated. "Project Helix is the solution to merging the high-performance capabilities of the PC with the convenience and optimization of a console."
blog/images/asha-sharma-tweet.png
content.caption: Asha Sharma confirmed the news on social media, emphasizing a future where performance meets accessibility.

content.value:
### Key Highlights from the Announcement

- **New System Architecture**: Project Helix is engineered to lead the next generation in performance. It utilizes a custom architecture that allows it to run massive PC game libraries without the need for complex and time-consuming 'ports'.
- **A Multi-Functional Hub**: Unlike the relatively "closed" ecosystems of previous Xbox generations, Project Helix aims to be a versatile entertainment hub, appealing to both hardcore PC gamers and traditional console enthusiasts.
- **Symbol of Convergence**: The new project logo features a double helix shape that subtly forms the letter 'X', representing the intersection and culmination of Microsoft's two largest software platforms.
blog/images/asha-sharma.png
content.caption: CEO Asha Sharma is spearheading Microsoft's 'Play Anywhere' vision with the launch of Project Helix.

content.value:
### What's Next?

While specific hardware specifications and pricing details remain under wraps, Microsoft has indicated that they will begin sharing deep technical insights with partners and developers at the **Game Developers Conference (GDC)** next week.

This move is seen as a powerful strategic response to competitors and a major step toward realizing the "play anywhere" vision that Microsoft has pursued for years through its Game Pass service. With Project Helix, the line between PC and console gaming might finally disappear for good.

title: iPhone 17e: Which Type of Gamer Is It For? Should You 'Invest' Right Now?
summary: Following its official launch, the iPhone 17e has quickly become a focal point for the tech community and mobile gamers alike. Is it the perfect balance of power and price?
author: HaleyReviews

content.value: Following its official launch, the iPhone 17e quickly became a name that attracted the attention of both the tech community and mobile gamers. As a budget-friendly version of the iPhone 17 series, this device is still equipped with a series of notable upgrades such as the A19 chip, a starting capacity of 256GB, and MagSafe support... making it an extremely attractive package.
blog/images/iphone17e-colors.png
content.caption: The new iPhone 17e comes in a variety of stunning colors.

content.value:
However, the question many gamers ask is: Who is the iPhone 17e really for? Is this a smartphone worth investing in if the main goal is for gaming?

### iPhone 17e - A Reasonable Choice for Non-Hardcore Gamers

If you are a gamer who loves Apple's new technology but doesn't necessarily need extreme performance, the iPhone 17e is a choice very much worth considering.
blog/images/a19-chip.png
content.caption: The A19 chip provides impressive performance for its class.

content.value:
The first strength lies in the A19 chip - Apple's latest processor. This is the same chip found in the standard iPhone 17, so in terms of overall performance, the iPhone 17e is fully capable of handling popular mobile games smoothly.

From casual games and puzzles to more intensive online games like MOBA or battle royale, this smartphone performs admirably. Users will rarely encounter lag during standard gameplay.
blog/images/gaming-2.png
content.caption: Popular titles run buttery smooth on the latest A19 hardware.

content.value:
However, Apple has made a small 'adjustment' to keep the price reasonable. Specifically, the A19 chip on the iPhone 17e only has 4 GPU cores instead of 5 like on the iPhone 17. This means graphical performance will be slightly lower when running extremely heavy games at maximum settings.

But for the vast majority of mobile gamers today, this difference is negligible. Those who mainly play games for entertainment after work, during lunch breaks, or while commuting will definitely find the experience perfectly smooth.

In addition, the 256GB starting storage is a huge plus. Today, many mobile titles take up several GBs. Apple raising the default memory to 256GB helps users comfortably install multiple games without worrying nearly as much about storage as before.

### Convenient and Portable Entertainment

Beyond performance, the iPhone 17e offers a usage experience that is very suitable for the 'fast and convenient' gaming style. The device retains a 6.1-inch OLED screen, which is a moderate size that is easy to hold for long periods without hand fatigue. With 1,200 nits of peak HDR brightness, visuals remain clear even outdoors.
blog/images/gaming-1.png
content.caption: Vibrant 6.1-inch OLED display makes every game look stunning.

content.value:
Another notable point is the new Ceramic Shield 2 glass. Apple claims this glass is significantly more durable, helping to limit scratches and increase impact resistance. For gamers who take their phones everywhere, this added durability is a welcomed upgrade.

The iPhone 17e also adds MagSafe, a feature that was absent on the previous generation. This allows for easy use of magnetic accessories like wireless chargers and gaming controllers. Moreover, the Qi2 wireless charging standard with 15W power makes topping up between matches much more practical.
blog/images/gaming-hand.jpg
content.caption: The compact design is ideal for comfortable one-handed navigation and long gaming sessions.

content.value:
### A Balanced and Worthy iPhone Choice

Starting at around 17.99 million VND for the 256GB version, the iPhone 17e is one of the most accessible iPhones in the new lineup.

Of course, if you are a hardcore gamer who frequently benchmarks performance at ultra settings or demands a ProMotion high-refresh-rate display, you might still look towards the Pro models. But for those who want a powerful, solid, and reliable smartphone with a high-end feel at a grounded price, the iPhone 17e is a fantastic balance. 

Simply put, it's not trying to be a dedicated gaming beast, but for most people who want mượt mà gaming in a portable package, it's a winner.

title: Mobile Games Surpass 50 Billion Downloads in 2025: Two Titles Lead the Charge
summary: Recent data from Sensor Tower reveals a staggering 50 billion downloads for mobile games in 2025, solidifying the platform's absolute dominance.
author: HaleyNews

content.value:
The latest report from Sensor Tower paints an impressive picture of the global gaming industry in 2025. Despite a slight slowdown in installation growth, mobile devices have once again affirmed their position as the absolute dominant platform, accounting for over 50 billion downloads out of a total 52 billion across all systems.

On average, more than 95,000 mobile games were downloaded every minute throughout 2025. This massive figure highlights the enduring appeal of the mobile market, even as total installations saw a modest 7% decrease compared to the previous year. As the market enters a mature phase, publishers are shifting their focus from raw download numbers to optimizing player retention and sustainable revenue growth.
blog/images/mobile-folder.jpg
content.caption: Smartphones: The world's most popular gaming console.

content.value:
### Mobile Still the Industry's 'Gold Mine'

According to the report, of the 52 billion total game downloads across Mobile, PC, and Console, Mobile alone contributed 50 billion. This reinforces the consensus that smartphones remain the most accessible and low-barrier gateway to gaming, thanks to global ubiquity and the free-to-play model.

In terms of platform distribution, Google Play accounted for 81% of total game downloads, while the App Store contributed 15%. However, an interesting paradox remains: despite lower installation numbers, the App Store recorded significantly higher in-app purchase revenue, particularly in the US market.
blog/images/market-chart.png
content.caption: Sensor Tower 2025: Mobile downloads dwarf PC and Console combined.

content.value:
### Two Titles Leading the Revenue Charts

In the broader industry landscape, the Strategy genre stood out as the only segment recording simultaneous growth in revenue, downloads, and playtime. The two giants leading the 2025 mobile revenue rankings were 'Last War: Survival' and 'Whiteout Survival.'
blog/images/lastwar-gameplay.jpg
content.caption: Last War: Survival - Redefining the strategy genre with innovative marketing.

content.value: Both titles leverage a mix of survival elements combined with base-building strategy and resource management – a formula that has proven highly successful with modern mobile gamers. Continuous content updates, in-game events, and deep social integration have helped them maintain massive communities while maximizing spending from loyal users.
blog/images/whiteout-survival.jpg
content.caption: Whiteout Survival: A masterclass in thematic consistency and player engagement.

content.value:
Regarding advertising trends, 2025 saw a significant shift as YouTube increased its market share of mobile game ad budgets. Publishers are giờ đây chú trọng xây dựng hệ sinh thái bền vững, tối đa hóa giá trị vòng đời khách hàng thay vì chỉ tối đa hóa số lượt cài đặt đơn thuần.

Kết lại, năm 2025 đánh dấu bước chuyển mình quan trọng của thị trường game di động, từ giai đoạn tăng trưởng nóng sang thời kỳ tối ưu hóa và phát triển bền vững.
